title: Skill 已在 Codex 加载不等于 Claude Code 和 OpenClaw 兼容已完成
source: Anchored from current session: user asked whether already-loaded skills in Codex App mean no more compatibility work is needed for Claude Code and OpenClaw; routed as misconception by dominant correction intent

mistaken_claim.zh: 只要一个 skill 已经在 Codex App 里被加载出来，就等于它对 Claude Code 和 OpenClaw 的兼容已经自然成立，不需要再做兼容设计。
mistaken_claim.en: If a skill is already loaded in the Codex App, its compatibility with Claude Code and OpenClaw is automatically complete and no additional compatibility design is needed.

why_it_seems_plausible.zh: 同一份 skill 已经在一个宿主里可见，容易让人误以为其他宿主也会按相同规则解析它。
why_it_seems_plausible.en: When the same skill is already visible in one host, it is easy to assume that other hosts will parse it under the same rules.

why_it_seems_plausible.zh: 从用户视角看，“能加载”很像“能通用”，所以会把运行时暴露状态误当成跨端兼容证明。
why_it_seems_plausible.en: From the user perspective, 'it loads' looks very similar to 'it is portable', so runtime exposure is mistaken for cross-platform compatibility proof.

why_it_is_wrong.zh: Codex、Claude Code 和 OpenClaw 的 skill 发现方式、字段约定、执行入口和上下文注入方式并不必然相同。
why_it_is_wrong.en: Codex, Claude Code, and OpenClaw do not necessarily share the same skill discovery rules, field contracts, execution entrypoints, or context injection behavior.

why_it_is_wrong.zh: 在 Codex 中成功加载，只能证明当前目录结构和说明文件足以被 Codex 接受，不能自动证明另外两端也会按同样方式工作。
why_it_is_wrong.en: A successful load in Codex only proves that the current directory structure and instruction files are acceptable to Codex; it does not automatically prove that the other two hosts will behave the same way.

why_it_is_wrong.zh: 真正的兼容要求通常还包括目录约定、说明文档边界、脚本调用方式以及各端的测试验证。
why_it_is_wrong.en: Real compatibility usually still requires alignment on directory conventions, instruction boundaries, script invocation shape, and validation on each host.

correct_understanding.zh: “已被 Codex 加载”只说明它在 Codex 侧可用，不等于三端兼容工作已经结束。
correct_understanding.en: 'Already loaded by Codex' only means it is usable on the Codex side; it does not mean cross-platform compatibility work is finished.

correct_understanding.zh: 更稳妥的做法是把公共协议抽出来，再分别检查 Claude Code 和 OpenClaw 是否接受同样的 skill 结构或需要薄适配层。
correct_understanding.en: The safer approach is to extract a shared protocol and then verify whether Claude Code and OpenClaw accept the same skill structure or need thin adapter layers.

what_it_confuses.zh: 它把“一个宿主里的可见性”混淆成了“多个宿主里的兼容性”。
what_it_confuses.en: It confuses visibility inside one host with compatibility across multiple hosts.

representative_counterexamples.zh: 一个 skill 可以在 Codex 中被扫描到，但如果 Claude Code 需要不同的目录边界或 OpenClaw 需要不同的元数据字段，它仍然需要兼容处理。
representative_counterexamples.en: A skill can be discovered in Codex, but if Claude Code needs a different directory boundary or OpenClaw expects different metadata fields, compatibility work is still required.

trigger_signals.zh: 只因为 skill 已出现在 Codex 可用列表中，就直接下结论说不需要再做 Claude Code 或 OpenClaw 兼容。
trigger_signals.en: Concluding that no more Claude Code or OpenClaw compatibility work is needed merely because the skill appears in the Codex available-skill list.

corrective_action.zh: 先区分“Codex 可用”与“三端兼容”这两个判断层级，再分别验证目录、协议和执行路径。
corrective_action.en: First separate the judgment levels of 'usable in Codex' and 'compatible across all three hosts', then validate directories, protocols, and execution paths independently.

corrective_action.zh: 如果目标是三端复用，优先维护共享核心协议，再为各宿主保留最小适配层。
corrective_action.en: If the goal is reuse across three hosts, maintain a shared core protocol first and keep only minimal host-specific adapters.

current_status_notes.zh: 这张卡由一次真实的 router 主导歧义线程写入验证创建，用来证明系统可以先判定误解类型，再落到 Misconception create 路径。
current_status_notes.en: This card was created through a real router-led ambiguous-thread write validation to prove that the system can classify the content as a misconception before landing on the Misconception create path.

current_upgrade_tasks.zh: 后续可补充一到两个 Claude Code 或 OpenClaw 侧的真实兼容差异案例。
current_upgrade_tasks.en: Later, add one or two real compatibility-difference cases from Claude Code or OpenClaw.
